case_title: RAVETTI FRANK A. VS FIDELITY TITLE

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-27-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAVETTI FRANK A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIDELITY TITLE $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $840.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY RAVETTI FRANK A. AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY TITLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY TITLE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAVETTI FRANK A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY TITLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY TITLE HEARING SET FOR AUG-27-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
